summary: Iter20 (SSRF fix + per-IP rate-limit + AI Growth Co-Pilot + Competitor Watch + Lead Enrichment) — 23/23 backend pytest pass, frontend flows verified for /dashboard CopilotPanel, /competitors page, and /leads enrichment block. ONE missing feature found: 'Competitor Watch' nav entry NOT present in left sidebar (Crosshair icon imported but no entry registered under Execution Engine in AppLayout.jsx).

minor.issue: Per-IP rate-limit uses request.client.host which is the ingress pod IP — different pods load-balance the same external user across multiple internal IPs (saw 10.79.131.85 + 10.79.131.86 in audit_runs from a single test client). Effective per-IP limit is therefore higher than 10/hr per real user. Should mirror /auth/login by reading X-Forwarded-For first-hop. Limit DOES trigger when XFF is honoured (verified by sending fixed XFF=203.0.113.55 — got 429).

ui_bugs.issue: Missing 'Competitor Watch' nav entry under Execution Engine. Crosshair icon is imported in /app/frontend/src/components/AppLayout.jsx line 5 but never wired up. data-testid='nav-competitors' not in DOM. Users cannot reach /competitors except by typing URL.

action_items: Add { to: '/competitors', label: 'Competitor Watch', icon: Crosshair, testid: 'nav-competitors' } entry to the 'Execution Engine' group in /app/frontend/src/components/AppLayout.jsx (line ~37).
Optional hardening: in POST /api/free-audit, derive client_ip from X-Forwarded-For first hop (same pattern used in /auth/login line 428-429) so per-IP rate-limit works behind k8s ingress.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now ~6094 lines — please split into modules (lead_magnets / copilot / competitors / enrichment).

_scrape_url_quick uses synchronous DNS resolution + no IP cap; consider also blocking IPv6 ULA (fc00::/7) and the IPv4 0.0.0.0/8 + 100.64.0.0/10 (CGNAT) ranges in addition to current is_private/is_loopback/is_link_local check.
/competitors POST does NOT validate URL scheme (e.g. accepts 'ftp://' or invalid strings). Should reject anything not http(s) before storing.
/leads/{id}/enrich does not check if the lead already has enrichment — re-enrich silently overwrites. Behavior is OK but a 'last_enriched_at' compare + a force=true flag would be more deliberate.
_copilot_cycle_for_user has no per-user concurrency lock — two simultaneous /copilot/run-now calls could double-generate kits when aggressiveness=aggressive.
FreeAuditIn.email still uses 'in payload.email' instead of Pydantic EmailStr (carry-over from iter19).
Crosshair icon imported in AppLayout.jsx but unused — dead import.

success_rate.frontend: ~85% — CopilotPanel ON/OFF/run-now/brief/mode chips OK; Competitors add/scan/render/delete OK with full AI sections (positioning, strengths, where-you-can-win, counter-moves); Lead enrichment block renders Company+Industry+Size+Role+green-opener+buying-signals; Re-enrich button switches in. Sidebar nav-competitors MISSING.

seed_data_creation: Created 1 admin copilot_settings (toggled cautious/balanced), 1 copilot_brief, 3 competitors (example.com / example.org / example.net) all auto-deleted by class fixture. Created 3 test leads (TestEnrich UI + jane-*@example.com + joe-*@gmail.com). 22+ audit_runs entries with rotating client IPs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend 23/23 green for iter20. Important data-testids: copilot-panel, copilot-run-now, copilot-mode-{cautious|balanced|aggressive|off}, copilot-brief, copilot-actions, competitors-page, competitor-url, competitor-nickname, competitor-add, competitor-list, competitor-{id}, scan-{id}, del-{id}, lead-enrichment, enrich-lead, reenrich-lead. /competitors UI scan populates 'Their positioning' / 'Strengths' chips / 'Where you can win' / 'Counter-moves' correctly (verified by screenshot). /api/leads expects field 'name' (single string), NOT first_name/last_name. Per-IP rate limit on /free-audit only triggers reliably when X-Forwarded-For is set; behind k8s ingress, request.client.host alone is insufficient. Apscheduler logs confirm 'Added job _copilot_daily_tick' at startup.
rca of the issue: Missing nav-competitors: developer added Crosshair import but forgot to add the actual entry in NAV_GROUPS array under Execution Engine. One-line fix in /app/frontend/src/components/AppLayout.jsx after line 37. Per-IP RL: behind k8s ingress, request.client.host returns the load-balanced pod's IP; need to consume X-Forwarded-For first hop like login endpoint does (line 428-429). Confirmed via direct DB query: 11 sequential POSTs landed on 2 different pod IPs (10.79.131.85 and 10.79.131.86).
